case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, VS. ARIVA DAMUNI ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 60018564)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-25-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-07-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF FRANK P AGNOST JR RE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE AND CONTINUANCE (TRANSACTION ID # 59715634) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-25-2016 CONTINUED TO JAN-31-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-25-2016 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT DAMUNI, ARIVA AKA ARIVA DAMONI DOES 1 THROUGH 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-06-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-03-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-13-2016
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-06-2016 CONTINUED TO SEP-07-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-31-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
